[[Major/Legends|Major]] '''Potiphar Migg''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] and officious field agent in the [[Imperial Security Bureau/Legends|Imperial Security Bureau]] on [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]]. He was a tall man with brown skin and milky white eyes. His eyes were equipped with cybernetic ocular implants that manifested themselves as pinpoints of red light emanating from his pupils.<ref name="CCW" />

Migg was assigned the task of "verifying the loyalty" of all citizens on Coruscant, which he attempted to do by haphazardly and unexpectedly conducting inspections of various homes, businesses, [[Starship/Legends|starships]], or even random citizens encountered on the street. He had ambitions to become a member of the Imperial Court and networked with low-ranked courtesans.<ref name="CCW" />

Though haughty and self-important, Migg was an able soldier, a crack shot with a [[Blaster/Legends|blaster]] aided by his implants, and able to track fleeing suspects with considerable tenacity.<ref name="CCW" />
